phases.name: Small Items & Ammo
phases.description: Quick builds: ammo, charges, small modules, and simple items (build time under 15 min)

phases.name: Frigates & Components
phases.description: T1 frigates, destroyers, drones, and mid-complexity modules (build time 15 min to 2 hours)

phases.name: Cruisers & Battlecruisers
phases.description: Cruiser and battlecruiser hulls with medium modules (build time 2 to 6 hours)

phases.name: Battleships & Large Items
phases.description: Battleship hulls, large modules, and complex items (build time 6 to 24 hours)

phases.name: Capitals & Advanced
phases.description: Capital ships, T2 components, and advanced manufacturing (build time over 24 hours)
